name: SBI SimplySAVE Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹1,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 10X Reward Points on dining transactions (10 RP per ₹100)
10X Reward Points on movie ticket purchases (10 RP per ₹100)
10X Reward Points on grocery store purchases (10 RP per ₹100)
10X Reward Points on departmental store purchases (10 RP per ₹100)
1 Reward Point per ₹100 on all other transactions

redemptionOptions: Gift vouchers from SBI Card catalogue

welcomeBenefits.condition: On first transaction within 30 days of card issuance

milestoneBenefits.benefit: Annual fee waiver for next year

additionalBenefits: 10X accelerated rewards on everyday categories like dining and grocery
Wide acceptance across dining and entertainment merchants
pros: 10X rewards on dining, movies, grocery, and departmental stores covers everyday spending
Low annual fee of ₹499 with easy ₹1 lakh spend waiver
Good entry-level card for building credit history
Wide range of accelerated reward categories
cons: Base earn rate of 1 RP per ₹100 is very low on non-bonus categories
Reward point value of ₹0.25 per point is mediocre
Welcome benefit of 500 RP is worth only ₹125
idealFor: Frequent diners and movie-goers who want accelerated rewards on entertainment
First-time credit card users looking for an affordable entry-level card
Grocery shoppers who want to earn more on everyday household spends

faqs.question: What categories earn 10X Reward Points?
faqs.answer: You earn 10X Reward Points on dining, movies, grocery, and departmental store purchases. All other spends earn 1 RP per ₹100.

faqs.question: What is the annual fee waiver condition?
faqs.answer: The ₹499 annual fee is waived if your annual spends exceed ₹1,00,000 in the previous year.

faqs.question: How much are the Reward Points worth?
faqs.answer: Each Reward Point is worth ₹0.25 when redeemed as statement credit or gift vouchers. So 10X rewards on bonus categories effectively gives you 2.5% return.

faqs.question: Is this card suitable for beginners?
faqs.answer: Yes, the SBI SimplySAVE is an excellent entry-level card with a low fee, easy waiver threshold, and good rewards on everyday spending categories like dining and grocery.
